movie.actors: Tyler Perry, Edward Burns, Matthew Fox, Jean Reno
movie.plot: Dr. Alex Cross is on his last police duty to track down an assassin called Picasso, who's been torturing and killing rich businessmen in Detroit. Soon when the mission gets personal, Cross is pushed to the edge of his moral and psychological limits to end this once and for all.
movie.title: Alex Cross
movie.writer: Marc Moss (screenplay), Kerry Williamson (screenplay), James Patterson (based on the novel "Cross" by)
